2604.19172.title: Reasoning-Aware AIGC Detection via Alignment and Reinforcement
2604.19172.paper_summary: The rapid advancement and widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) have elevated the need for reliable AI-generated content (AIGC) detection, which remains challenging as models evolve. We introduce AIGC-text-bank, a comprehensive multi-domain dataset with diverse LLM sources and authorship scenarios, and propose REVEAL, a detection framework that generates interpretable reasoning chains before classification. Our approach uses a two-stage training strategy: supervised fine-tuning to establish reasoning capabilities, followed by reinforcement learning to improve accuracy, improve logical consistency, and reduce hallucinations. Extensive experiments show that REVEAL achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, offering a robust and transparent solution for AIGC detection. The project is open-source at https://aka.ms/reveal
2604.19172.paper_summary_zh: 快速進展和廣泛採用的大型語言模型（LLMs）提高了對可靠的人工智慧生成內容（AIGC）檢測的需求，這在模型不斷演變的情況下仍然具有挑戰性。我們介紹了AIGC-text-bank，這是一個全面的多領域數據集，擁有多樣的LLM來源和作者情境，並提出了REVEAL，一個在分類之前生成可解釋推理鏈的檢測框架。我們的方法使用了兩階段的訓練策略：首先進行有監督的微調以建立推理能力，然後進行強化學習以提高準確性、增強邏輯一致性並減少幻覺。廣泛的實驗表明，REVEAL在多個基準上達到了最先進的性能，提供了一個穩健且透明的AIGC檢測解決方案。該項目在https://aka.ms/reveal上開源。
2604.19172.author: Zhao Wang et.al.
2604.19172.authors: Zhao Wang, Max Xiong, Jianxun Lian, Zhicheng Dou
